institution.name: J. F. Drake State Community and Technical College

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at J. F. Drake State Community and Technical College are 18% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($28.3k vs $34.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at J. F. Drake State Community and Technical College fell 37% between 2009 and 2010 (17.7% → 11.2%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at J. F. Drake State Community and Technical College fell 32% between 2007 and 2010 (30.6% → 20.9%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 13 pp at J. F. Drake State Community and Technical College vs the 2004–2008 baseline (11.1% vs 23.8%).
